title: ERP-MES Printing (ISA-95)
description: Printing industry overlay for erp-mes-core: flexo press fleet, film/ink materials, Flexibase event code catalog (OGP/BM/POUCH), Zero Pull setup tags, job bag sections
changelog: 1.0.1 - Flatten dashboard widget settingsJson to top-level fields (reportPath, objectPath, functionName) so operator UI works without web-console settingsJson expansion.

changelog.notes: 1.0.1 - Flatten dashboard widget settingsJson to top-level fields (reportPath, objectPath, functionName) so operator UI works without web-console settingsJson expansion.
Initial release: flexo printing overlay on erp-mes-core 1.0.0, certified by ErpMesPrintingOverlayTest cross-bundle scenarios
